parts.text: {"answer":"src/cache/index.ts scopes TTL by namespace so one noisy namespace cannot extend or evict unrelated namespaces through a shared global TTL policy.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e1bc448cffe3CdQOJsdxOrjb9","blob_id":"cache_namespace_ttl","message_id":"msg_e1e43bb84001EgwI56ru5gxRDS"},"rationale":"The cited message states that a global TTL was considered, but namespace-scoped TTL was chosen to isolate namespaces from each other's TTL effects.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["Billing cache global TTL","Image cache namespace notes"]}
